Key.English: Set AI Skill levels per faction by presets or custom settings
Key.Chinesesimp: 通过预设或自定义设置设置每个派系的人工智能技能等级

Key.English: Only one AI SKILL module allowed
Key.Chinesesimp: 只允许一个人工智能技能模块
启用人工智能技能模组调试

Key.English: Units of these factions will use Recruit-tier skill values (low accuracy, slow reactions, short detection range). Lowest preset — use for untrained militia or irregular forces. Preset values are fixed. To assign exact per-parameter values to a faction, use the Custom Skill Values section below instead.

Units of these factions will use Regular-tier skill values (moderate accuracy, average reactions). Baseline preset suitable for most conventional forces. Preset values are fixed. To assign exact per-parameter values to a faction, use the Custom Skill Values section below instead.

Units of these factions will use Veteran-tier skill values (good accuracy, faster reactions, better spotting). Use for experienced infantry or special operations forces. Preset values are fixed. To assign exact per-parameter values to a faction, use the Custom Skill Values section below instead.

Units of these factions will use Expert-tier skill values (high accuracy, fast reactions, long detection range). Highest preset — use for top-tier special forces. Preset values are fixed. To assign exact per-parameter values to a faction, use the Custom Skill Values section below instead.

Optional. Type extra faction classnames for mods not currently loaded but expected at mission time. Format: comma-separated classnames with no spaces or quotes — e.g. OPF_F,rhs_faction_msv. Combined with the Factions multi-select above at runtime.
Key.Chinese: 可選。輸入目前未載入的模組派系類名，格式：逗號分隔，無空格，無引號。
Key.Chinesesimp: 可选。输入当前未加载的模组派系类名，格式：逗号分隔，无空格，无引号。
Key.Spanish: Opcional. Escriba classnames de facciones adicionales para mods no cargados actualmente. Formato: nombres separados por comas, sin espacios ni comillas.
Key.French: Facultatif. Saisissez les classnames de factions supplémentaires pour les mods non chargés actuellement. Format : noms séparés par des virgules, sans espaces ni guillemets.
Key.Portuguese: Opcional. Digite classnames de facções adicionais para mods não carregados atualmente. Formato: nomes separados por vírgulas, sem espaços ou aspas.
Key.Russian: Необязательно. Введите classnames дополнительных фракций для незагруженных модов. Формат: имена через запятую, без пробелов и кавычек.

Key.English: Factions whose units will receive the exact skill values you configure below. This section is independent of the preset tiers above — presets use fixed hardcoded values, while this section gives full control over each parameter. If a faction is also assigned to a preset tier, the custom values take precedence. Leave empty to apply no custom values.
Minimum general ability (0.0–1.0). Combined with maximum to give each unit a random ability value within the range. Lower = weaker AI overall.
Maximum general ability (0.0–1.0). Combined with minimum to give each unit a random ability value within the range. Higher = stronger AI overall.
How accurately the unit aims (0.0–1.0). Lower values cause more scatter. Works alongside Aim Shake and Aim Speed.
How much the unit's aim wobbles between shots (0.0–1.0). Higher values increase weapon sway. Works alongside Aim Accuracy.
How quickly the unit acquires and tracks targets (0.0–1.0). Higher values mean faster target acquisition.
No effect in Arma 3 — the endurance sub-skill has been ignored by the engine since early development. Value is accepted but never applied. This field will be removed in a future version.
Maximum detection range multiplier (0.0–1.0). Higher values allow the unit to spot enemies at greater distances.
How quickly the unit spots a detected enemy (0.0–1.0). Lower values mean the unit is slower to confirm and react to contacts.
Unit willingness to advance and engage under fire (0.0–1.0). Lower values make units more likely to fall back or suppress rather than assault.
Likelihood that the unit abandons combat and retreats when under fire (0.0–1.0). Higher values make units more prone to fleeing. Lower values keep them engaged longer. Works alongside Courage.
How quickly the unit attempts to reload after firing (0.0–1.0). Higher values reduce reload time.
Quality of the unit's command decisions when acting as a group leader (0.0–1.0). Higher values improve squad-level tactics and target prioritisation.
Overall AI skill multiplier (0.0–1.0). Acts as a global modifier affecting all other skill traits. Set lower to broadly weaken a faction without adjusting individual values.
